welcome_card.body_0.items_0.columns_1.it: Welcome to the employee onboarding assistant
welcome_card.body_2.text: What would you like to do?
welcome_card.actions_0.title: Start Onboarding
welcome_card.actions_1.title: Check Progress
welcome_card.actions_2.title: Upload Documents

employee_form_card.body_1.text: Welcome to {{company_name}}! Please fill in your information below.
employee_form_card.body_2.items_1.label: Full Name
employee_form_card.body_2.items_2.label: Work Email
employee_form_card.body_3.items_1.label: Department
employee_form_card.body_3.items_2.label: Job Title / Role
employee_form_card.body_3.items_3.label: Start Date
employee_form_card.body_3.items_4.label: Reporting Manager
employee_form_card.actions_0.title: Submit Registration
employee_form_card.actions_1.title: Cancel
document_upload_card.body_2.text: Please submit the following documents to complete your onboarding.
document_upload_card.body_3.items_0.colu: Passport, driver's license, or national ID card
document_upload_card.body_5.items_0.colu: Your signed offer letter and employment agreement
document_upload_card.body_6.items_0.colu: Emergency contact details and medical information
document_upload_card.actions_0.title: Back to Menu
access_request_card.body_2.text: Select the systems you need access to for your role.
access_request_card.body_3.items_1.title: Corporate Email (Outlook/Gmail)
access_request_card.body_3.items_2.title: Slack (Team messaging)
access_request_card.body_4.items_1.title: GitHub (Source code repositories)
access_request_card.body_4.items_2.title: Jira (Project tracking)
access_request_card.body_5.items_1.title: VPN (Remote network access)
access_request_card.body_5.items_2.title: Building Access (Badge/keycard)
access_request_card.actions_0.title: Submit Access Request
access_request_card.actions_1.title: Back to Menu
completion_card.body_0.items_1.text: Congratulations, {{employee_name}}! Your onboarding is now complete.
completion_card.body_3.items_1.text:
1. Check your email for account activation links
2. Set up your development environment
3. Meet your team and manager
4. Review the employee handbook
5. Complete any department-specific training
completion_card.body_4.text: If you need any help, contact HR at hr@acmecorp.com
completion_card.actions_0.title: Back to Menu
